name: Ledbyher
description: '''Rachel Aisyah Diack''' (born 2003), known professionally as '''Ledbyher''', is an English rapper, songwriter and record producer. Cited by ''[[The Guardian]]'' as a member of the [[UK underground rap]] scene, she describes her musical style as 'bedroom [[UK drill|drill]]'. Her work is characterized by a "wispy, sung-spoken" delivery and ethereal, [[Lo-fi music|lo-fi]] instrumentals. Her debut extended play (EP) ''CUNCH'' was released in 2023, before she signed to [[Island Records]] and released the mixtape ''The Elephant'' in 2026.
